utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh , that is what she meant !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: You know , if they are gonna shorten it , they should call it the MUSE !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: You know , short for museum , and avoid all the confusion !

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yeah , most of it it is a place packed with confused angry baseball fans !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Ok , all right , so I will take her to the MET .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: Yeah , uh , uh , ok , there is this great rare bookstore on Madison Avenue .

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: She loves architecture , you know what you should do ?

utterances.speaker: Ross
utterances.text: You should take a walk down fifth to the Saint Patrick Cathedral and there there is this great little pastry shop that she would love .

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Geez , sounds like you should be going on this date !

utterances.text: But I am not ! . You know what if you are in the mood for Thai food ...

utterances.text: Whoa , whoa , whoa ! Slow down , you go way too fast .
